name: UBU-TOOLS
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R 1000:1000 . 2>/dev/null || true && sudo chmod 755 /home/dev-tools 2>/dev/null || true && sudo chown -R 1000:1000 /home/dev-tools/.vscode-server 2>/dev/null || true && sudo mkdir -p /home/dev-tools/.gnupg /home/dev-tools/.ssh /home/dev-tools/.cache /home/dev-tools/.config && sudo chown 1000:1000 /home/dev-tools/.gnupg /home/dev-tools/.ssh /home/dev-tools/.cache /home/dev-tools/.config && sudo chmod 700 /home/dev-tools/.gnupg /home/dev-tools/.ssh && sudo chmod 755 /home/dev-tools/.cache /home/dev-tools/.config && sudo mkdir -p /run/user/1000/gnupg && sudo chown -R 1000:1000 /run/user/1000 2>/dev/null || true && ln -sf /tmp/wayland-0 /run/user/1000/wayland-0 2>/dev/null || true && git config --global --add safe.directory '*' && git config --global init.defaultBranch main && bash -c 'bash /opt/dev-control/scripts/alias-loading.sh <<< A'
